authentication.payload_digest: SHA-256 over canonical JSON excluding payload_digest and signature
authentication.key_selection: signing_key_id resolved from a separately governed consumer trust bundle
authentication.private_key_boundary: Archive-only managed secret; never published to consumers

invariants: Only archived proof-pack documents with an assigned retention policy are eligible.
Caller tenant must exactly match the archived document tenant.
Legal hold takes precedence over elapsed retention and purge eligibility.
disposal_authorized is always false; a decision projection never replaces the entitled purge command.
Same-key same-input replay returns the original signed decision across process restarts.
Same-key changed-input replay fails with conflict.
Raw client, portfolio, holding, transaction, report payload, and document binary data are excluded.

persistence.production_posture: blocked until the durable Archive repository adapter and managed Ed25519 key source are available

non_proof_boundaries: This contract is not legal or regulatory approval of a retention duration or disposal action.
This contract does not grant lotus-idea authority to set or release holds or execute purge.
Local development signatures and SQLite proof are not production certification.
